purpose: Scan every frozen uncertainty-QUBO candidate against its own matched linear top-k comparator to determine whether the failed nested gate reflects candidate-family failure or candidate-selection failure.

performance_checks: primary median OOF BEDROC delta versus the candidate's matched linear top-k is at least zero
mean individual-seed OOF BEDROC delta is at least zero
every individual-seed OOF BEDROC delta is at least zero
structural_checks: the full-train QUBO subset differs from its matched linear top-k subset
mean seed-specific subset pairwise Jaccard across folds is at least 0.5
full-train seed-specific subset pairwise Jaccard is at least 0.5
diagnostic_classification.family_viable_definition: at least one frozen candidate passes every performance and structural diagnostic check
diagnostic_classification.family_failure_definition: no frozen candidate passes every performance and structural diagnostic check

interpretation_boundary: This is a label-aware post hoc diagnostic on the already-used 160 development-train ligands. It cannot retroactively pass the failed gate, select a validation candidate, authorize validation docking, read validation/test rows, or establish biological, affinity, generalization, QUBO-benefit, or quantum-advantage claims.
